players.availability_comment: Official IPL 2026 schedule published only for Phase 1; assumed available for listed April fixtures absent injury/news.
players.availability_note: No current adverse availability report found; only Phase 1 fixtures (4 matches) are published, so full-season estimate is uncertain.
players.followup_reason: Phase-2/full fixture list and preseason XI clarity not yet available.
players.overseas_competition_comment: Domestic spinner competing on role balance, not overseas slots.
players.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas-player cap is not the constraint. Competition is from other spin/all-round options for XI balance.
players.playing_xi_comment: Part of retained core and regular GT spin option; likely starter but XI not officially confirmed.

players.availability_comment: Only first 4 GT league fixtures are officially published for IPL 2026 so season-wide estimate is provisional.
players.availability_note: No adverse availability report found; estimate capped by incomplete published fixture list.
players.followup_reason: No official 2026 opening XI announcement yet.
players.overseas_competition_comment: Selection pressure is role-based, not overseas-slot based.
players.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas cap does not apply. Role competition is minimal given top-order status.
players.playing_xi_comment: Retained core top-order batter and clear first-choice Indian batting option.

players.availability_comment: Returned from earlier injury-hit period in 2025; no fresh 2026 issue found. Full 14-match schedule not yet published.
players.availability_note: No current injury/unavailability report found, but estimate remains provisional due to incomplete fixtures.
players.followup_reason: Need confirmation no preseason workload issue emerges closer to opener.
players.overseas_competition_comment: Role competition from other pacers, not overseas-slot pressure.
players.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas cap is not the constraint. Competes with Indian seam depth only for combination tweaks.
players.playing_xi_comment: Retained frontline quick; strong indication of first-choice pace role.

players.availability_comment: ECB lists IPL 2026 running 26 Mar-31 May and Buttler retained by GT; no explicit withdrawal notice found for April fixtures.
players.availability_note: Available for IPL 2026 per ECB auction/season note; no April 2026 conflict identified, but full-season estimate remains uncertain because only Phase 1 fixtures are published.
players.followup_reason: Need late check for any ECB-managed workload or national call-up update.
players.overseas_competition_comment: Overseas slot pressure exists generally, but Buttler projects as a lock within the four.
players.overseas_competition_note: One of GT's strongest overseas locks; overseas cap exists but Buttler is a first-choice pick when available.
players.playing_xi_comment: Retained premium overseas wicketkeeper-batter; strong first-choice XI inference.

players.availability_comment: Captaincy announcement strongly indicates availability for Phase 1 fixtures; full-season estimate limited by incomplete schedule publication.
players.availability_note: Named as captain in GT's IPL 2026 communications; no adverse availability report found. Estimate is still provisional because only 4 league fixtures are published.
players.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas cap is irrelevant. Captaincy makes role competition minimal.

players.availability_comment: No fresh official injury/news found for April 2026. Full-league estimate constrained by incomplete schedule release.
players.availability_note: No current 2026 absence reported; estimate provisional because only Phase 1 fixtures are public.
players.followup_reason: Monitor final overseas combination and any CSA/workload updates.
players.overseas_competition_comment: Strong overseas candidate but not as locked as Buttler/Rashid if balance changes.
players.overseas_competition_note: Competes for one of four overseas slots with Buttler, Rashid Khan, Glenn Phillips and Jason Holder.
players.playing_xi_comment: Retained frontline overseas quick; likely XI but overseas-combination choices can affect exact spot.

players.availability_comment: No fresh injury or absence report located for April 2026 fixtures.

players.followup_reason: Need opener-week XI clarity in spin/all-round balance.

players.playing_xi_comment: Domestic spin-bowling all-round option frequently used for balance; likely but not fully locked.

players.availability_comment: Only Phase 1 fixtures officially published, so season estimate is approximate.

players.availability_comment: No fresh April 2026 injury/absence report located. Full-season estimate remains provisional due to partial fixture release.
players.availability_note: No current 2026 unavailability report found, but XI chance is more uncertain than squad availability.

players.overseas_competition_comment: Likely benched in some combinations despite being retained.

players.playing_xi_comment: Retained overseas all-round/batting option but squeezed by four-overseas cap and Holder/Buttler/Rashid/Rabada mix.

players.availability_note: No April 2026 national-team clash found; retained by GT and no current adverse report located. Estimate still provisional due to incomplete league schedule publication.

players.playing_xi_comment: Retained frontline Indian quick and core pace option.

players.availability_comment: No fresh injury or international-conflict report identified from searched sources.

players.availability_comment: Only Phase 1 fixtures officially published; season estimate is approximate.

content.text:
You are an IPL 2026 squad availability and lineup analyst.

Your job is only to assess non-stats fields for one IPL squad:
- playing_xi_tier
- availability_modifier
- availability_note
- overseas_competition_note
- research_confidence
- source URLs for each aspect
- whether this player still needs a player-level follow-up

Use web search. Prefer evidence in this order:
1. Official IPL / franchise / BCCI sources
2. Reputable cricket reporting
3. Other high-signal recent coverage only when better sources are unavailable

Rules:
- Do not invent facts.
- Be conservative. If evidence is weak or conflicting, lower research_confidence.
- Do not fetch batting/bowling stats; those are handled elsewhere.
- playing_xi_tier must be one of: GUARANTEED, LIKELY, ROTATION, UNLIKELY
- playing_xi_basis must be one of: confirmed_role, inferred_from_team_context, conflicting_reports, unknown
- availability_basis must be one of: confirmed_available, inferred_no_adverse_news, injury_report, late_joining, tournament_conflict, suspension, conflicting_reports, unknown
- overseas_competition_basis must be one of: overseas_slot_pressure, role_depth_competition, domestic_player, confirmed_role, conflicting_reports, unknown
- research_confidence must be one of: High, Medium, Low
- Use actual published IPL 2026 fixtures in the prompt when estimating availability.
- availability_expected_matches_available must be an integer from 0 to 14.
- availability_modifier must equal availability_expected_matches_available / 14, rounded reasonably.
- If published fixtures are incomplete, say so in availability_comment and lower research_confidence where that materially affects the answer.
- availability_modifier = 1.0 is allowed only with an explicit basis and comment.
- Every player must have at least one URL in each of:
  - playing_xi_source_urls
  - availability_source_urls
  - overseas_competition_source_urls
- For domestic players with no overseas-slot issue, overseas_competition_note should still explain that the overseas cap is not the constraint.
- Keep comments short, factual, and audit-friendly.
- Return JSON only.

Assess this IPL 2026 squad and return the structured JSON.
